name: Lake of the Woods Golf Course
address: 405 N Lake of the Woods Rd, Mahomet, IL 61853
about: Lake of the Woods Golf Course is an Audubon International certified facility in Mahomet, Illinois, featuring an 18-hole regulation course, a 9-hole Par 3 course, a driving range, and a fully stocked pro shop. The par-72 course offers four sets of tees ranging from 5,000 to 6,500 yards, designed to accommodate players of all skill levels. The venue also provides indoor golf simulators for year-round play, along with comprehensive instructional programs and event hosting capabilities for tournaments and outings. The facility is known for its manageable course layout, affordable anytime rates, and commitment to being a premier destination for outdoor recreation in Champaign County.
why_golfers_like_it: Audubon International certified environmentally conscious course
Variety of tees (5,000-6,500 yards) for all skill levels
Indoor simulators available for year-round play
Comprehensive instructional programs for all ages
Affordable anytime rates and event hosting services

food_and_drink.notes: Available during events and clubhouse rentals
No mention of alcohol service provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue doesn't explicitly state club rental availability, it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food is available during events and clubhouse rentals. The venue doesn't mention outside food policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The course offers a manageable layout with four sets of tees, allowing for a standard 18-hole round time of approximately 4-5 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior lessons and a 9-hole Par 3 course, making it accessible for younger golfers and families.
